'''Thulls''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] who owned and ran the [[Slippery Gelgelar Eel]] dining establishment at the [[Gelgelar Free Port/Legends|Gelgelar Free Port]] on [[Gelgelar/Legends|Gelgelar]].

The long suffering [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] mistook [[Gelgelar/Legends|Gelgelar]] for a lush tropic world, not a cold damp swamp. Ever since he arrived he had a cold that changed from mild and annoying to full and severe. Many blamed this for the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian's]] lack of conversation. In reality he was simply quietly watching all that went on in [[Gelgelar Free Port/Legends|Gelgelar Free Port]], and there was very little that went on that he did not know about. No person, [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], cargo or event came to town without him knowing. This information was available for sale if enough credits were offered.

{{Char-stub}}
